message.content:
@startuml
actor 消费者 as Consumer
participant "监管消费者服务端" as Service
database db
queue "数字人民币" as DigitalRMB
rectangle DB { }

Consumer ->> Service : 购买课程
Service->db:生成订单号并保存
Service->DigitalRMB：获取付款二维码
Service-->Consumer:返回订单号和付款二维码
note right of Consumer\n支付 end note 
loop 轮询查询支付状况 \n[到达最大等待时间仍未查到成功支付]
    alt [查询到成功支付]\n修改订单状态，划拨
        Service -->DB:通知页面跳转
        
     else   [未查找到结果]   
         modify order status to close  
         
      endif
      
end loop


@enduml
